question: What was our total invoice revenue in Q1 2026?
sql:
SELECT SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) AS total_revenue_aud
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
  AND t.trandate BETWEEN TO_DATE('2026-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2026-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

question: monthly net revenue for the trailing 12 months, counting credit memos as negative
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'CustInvc' THEN t.foreigntotal
                WHEN t.type = 'CustCred' THEN -t.foreigntotal
                ELSE 0 END) AS net_revenue
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred')
  AND t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -12)
  AND t.trandate < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: how much did we invoice last month
sql:
SELECT SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS invoiced_amount
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
  AND t.trandate >= TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM')
  AND t.trandate < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')

question: weekly invoiced totals from 1 May 2026 to 30 June 2026
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-IW') AS week, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS invoiced_total
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
  AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2026-05-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-IW')
ORDER BY week

question: give me an AR aging with 0-30, 31-60, 61-90 and 90+ buckets by customer
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: which customers currently owe us more than $50,000?
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: outstanding AR by subsidiary converted to AUD
sql:
SELECT s.name AS subsidiary, ROUND(SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate), 2) AS outstanding_ar_aud
FROM transaction t
JOIN subsidiary s ON s.id = t.subsidiary
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
  AND t.status = 'open'
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY outstanding_ar_aud DESC

question: show invoices that have been open for more than 60 days with the customer's email, oldest first
sql:
SELECT t.tranid, c.companyname, t.trandate, t.foreigntotal
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc' AND t.status = 'open'
ORDER BY t.trandate

question: what's the balance of account 4000 for the Jul 2025 period?
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: total expenses by GL account for Jan through Mar 2026
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END) AS income,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS expenses,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END)
         - SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS net
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: net income for June 2026
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END) AS income,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS expenses,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END)
         - SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS net
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: how much have we spent with Logistics vendors this year?
sql:
SELECT v.companyname, v.category, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS spend
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
GROUP BY v.companyname, v.category
ORDER BY spend DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: monthly AP spend by vendor category over the last 6 months
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: which vendors did we actually pay more than $20k in Q2 2026?
sql:
SELECT v.companyname, v.category, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS spend
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
GROUP BY v.companyname, v.category
ORDER BY spend DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: top 5 items by 2026 invoice revenue, and include ties for 5th place
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: show me the 3 largest invoices we've ever issued
sql:
SELECT t.tranid, c.companyname, t.trandate, t.foreigntotal
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc' AND t.status = 'open'
ORDER BY t.trandate

question: bottom 10 customers by 2025 invoice revenue — only customers who actually got invoiced
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: revenue posted to the Mar 2026 accounting period, even where the transaction date fell in a different month
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: which accounting periods are still open, and how much invoice revenue is posted into each?
sql:
SELECT t.tranid, c.companyname, t.trandate, t.foreigntotal
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc' AND t.status = 'open'
ORDER BY t.trandate

question: for Q1 2026 compare invoice totals by transaction-date month vs by posting period — I want to spot backdated postings
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: break down 2026 invoice revenue by product line
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: invoice revenue by location and subsidiary so far this year
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: netamount by department and class for the Professional Services department this year
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END) AS income,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS expenses,
       SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN tal.credit - tal.debit ELSE 0 END)
         - SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('COGS', 'Expense') THEN tal.debit - tal.credit ELSE 0 END) AS net
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: 2026 invoice revenue grouped by the sales rep's department
sql:
SELECT e.firstname || ' ' || e.lastname AS rep, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN employee e ON e.id = t.employee
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY e.firstname, e.lastname
ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: 2025 invoice revenue by transaction currency with the AUD-converted total for each
sql:
SELECT s.name AS subsidiary, cur.name AS currency,
       SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue_local,
       ROUND(SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate), 2) AS revenue_aud
FROM transaction t
JOIN subsidiary s ON s.id = t.subsidiary
JOIN currency cur ON cur.id = t.currency
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY s.name, cur.name
ORDER BY revenue_aud DESC

question: list open USD invoices with the amount in USD and what that is in AUD
sql:
SELECT t.tranid, c.companyname, t.trandate, t.foreigntotal
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc' AND t.status = 'open'
ORDER BY t.trandate

question: rank subsidiaries by Q2 2026 invoice revenue in AUD, and show how much of each one's revenue was billed in a currency other than its own base currency
sql:
SELECT s.name AS subsidiary, cur.name AS currency,
       SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue_local,
       ROUND(SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate), 2) AS revenue_aud
FROM transaction t
JOIN subsidiary s ON s.id = t.subsidiary
JOIN currency cur ON cur.id = t.currency
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY s.name, cur.name
ORDER BY revenue_aud DESC

question: which items have fewer than 20 units available at any location?
sql:
SELECT i.displayname, SUM(l.quantity) AS units, SUM(l.netamount) AS revenue
FROM transactionline l
JOIN item i ON i.id = l.item
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = l.transaction
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY i.displayname
ORDER BY units DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: total available stock per inventory item across all locations, including items with no inventory rows
sql:
SELECT loc.name AS location, i.itemid, i.displayname, ib.quantityonhand, ib.quantityavailable
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item i ON i.id = ib.item
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = ib.location
ORDER BY loc.name, ib.quantityonhand DESC

question: for each item, do we have enough stock on hand to cover open sales order demand?
sql:
SELECT t.tranid, c.companyname, t.trandate, t.foreigntotal
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd' AND t.status = 'pendingFulfillment'
ORDER BY t.trandate

question: what's our average order value for sales orders placed in 2026?
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(AVG(t.foreigntotal), 2) AS avg_invoice
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: on average, how many distinct SKUs are on each invoice?
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(AVG(t.foreigntotal), 2) AS avg_invoice
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: revenue by item class for 2026 with each class's percentage of total revenue
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: by month in 2026: number of invoices and number of invoice line items
sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month

question: net revenue per customer for 2025 after subtracting credit memos
sql:
SELECT c.companyname, SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS revenue
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY c.companyname
ORDER BY revenue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

question: invoice revenue by department for 2026 — show every department even if it booked nothing
sql:
SELECT d.name AS department, SUM(l.netamount) AS revenue
FROM transactionline l
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = l.transaction
JOIN department d ON d.id = l.department
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY d.name
ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: average selling price per unit by item for 2026 invoice lines — don't divide by zero if quantities net out
sql:
SELECT i.displayname, SUM(l.quantity) AS units, SUM(l.netamount) AS revenue
FROM transactionline l
JOIN item i ON i.id = l.item
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = l.transaction
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
GROUP BY i.displayname
ORDER BY units DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

sql:
